{{Quote|I can fly an X-wing! They'll need every fighter pilot on Arda!|[[Zon Zorad]], to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="ALAWL" />}}
'''Arda II''', also spelled '''Arda-2''', and also known simply as '''Arda''', was an [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]] located in the [[Arda system/Legends|Arda system]], a part of the [[Back Reach]] area of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] within the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Ardan Cross]] connected it to the [[Feldwes system/Legends|Feldwes]] and [[Kalishik system/Legends|Kalishik systems]], and another hyperlane linked it to the [[Capella system/Legends|Capella system]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
{{Quote|Neutral planets are ''valuable'' to both sides… in ''every'' war!|An Ardan, to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="ALAWL" />}}
The [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Arda II held a neutral stance during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Mag Doum]] reported to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] that there was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] presence on planet, the rulers of Arda II openly supported the Rebellion in fear of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Attack on Arda II|reprisal]].<ref name="CSWE-Arda" /> The planet was ruled by the [[Qualo]].<ref name="CSWE-Qualo">{{CSWECite|II|59|Qualo, the}}</ref>

During the [[Stenax Massacres]], Arda II was [[Invasion of Arda II|invaded]] by the [[Stenax]].<ref name="TMS">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref>

[[Tun Wala]] was a major [[City/Legends|city]] on the planet.<ref name="ALAWL" /> It hosted massive trade shows<ref name="TMS" /> and was the source of [[T-6 diodem]]s.<ref name="ALAWL" />

{{Planet-stub}}
